documentation.file_docstring: HTTP callback handler for Mattermost slash commands. Receives POST requests from Mattermost when a slash command is invoked, validates the token, and routes the command through the standard inbound pipeline.
inline_comments: Read the full request body as a string.
Resolve channel info so we can enforce DM vs group/channel policies.

Create the HTTP request handler for Mattermost slash command callbacks. This handler is registered as a plugin HTTP route and receives POSTs from the Mattermost server when a user invokes a registered slash command.
Validate token — fail closed: reject when no tokens are registered
(e.g. registration failed or startup was partial)
Acknowledge immediately — we'll send the actual reply asynchronously
Now handle the command asynchronously (post reply as a message)
Build inbound context — the command text is the body

functions.name: readBody
functions.doc: Read the full request body as a string.

functions.name: createSlashCommandHttpHandler
functions.doc: Create the HTTP request handler for Mattermost slash command callbacks.     This handler is registered as a plugin HTTP
